title: [MTR3/4] 東武30000系電車 | Tobu 30000 series
description: Resource pack that adds Tobu 30000 series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The Tobu 30000 series is a DC EMU produced by Alna Kōki, Tokyu Car Corporation, and Fuji Heavy Industries (now Subaru). They're constructed between 1996 and 2003 for the Tobu Isesaki Line, to allow Tobu Railway to operating through services towards Eidan (now Tokyo Metro) Hanzonmon Line and Tokyu Den-en-Toshi Line. They're initially set into 6-car and 4-car sets (and a 6-car unit can couple to a 4-car unit), however this reduced capacity of the train, which makes this train to eventually leave Hanzonmon Line and Den-en-Toshi Line through services, and relocate to services between Isesaki, Nikko and Utsunomiya. They're eventually being transferred to Tojo Line and being converted into 10-car fixed formation (similar to other Tojo Line trains, such as some 10030 series), and being refurbished.

This resource pack is to add the Tobu 30000 series into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2024.

# What will be in this pack?
### Tobu 30000 series:
1. First Batch (31601F~31606F?)

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Tobu Railway Company, Ltd.
